output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?episode WHERE {
  wd:Q15711398 wdt:P125 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P125 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P577 ?date .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
